para_trans: Government Decision No: Committee 2026 / Q. No.160 / RUSA-1 No.1651137
The functions of the Committee: -
Integrated Arogya Vardhini Samiti is at Taluk level, Municipal Area and District level.
is being implemented. The functions of the Committee shall be as follows:
(i) To make health institutions fully functional as per the guidelines of the Central and State Governments;
To create robust health facilities and regulate access to health services.
2) To review the functioning of health institutions and enhance the efficiency of health institutions.
3) Public Health Committees, Patient Welfare Committees, Women's Health Committees and Village Health, Nutrition,
Community participation in health programmes through water supply and sanitation committees.
Enhancement and thereby strengthening of health facilities.
4) Qualitative and effective enhancement of the quality of health services provided by health institutions.
/ to improve.
5) Ease of access to public health services under the National Health Programme and State Policy.
To address and qualitatively address the health issues of citizens / patients.
6) Establishing coordination within the organization / department and health related activities / programmes.
successful implementation.
7) To take necessary measures to improve the rating standards of health institutions.
8) To the other concerned Heads of Departments for the meeting of the said Committee with the consent of the Chairman of the Committee.
can be invited. NGOs are also invited to the committee, as the case may be.

Planning and compliance of meetings of the Committee.-
(1) The Committee shall hold four (4) meetings annually, one (1) of every three (3) months.
Do it.
(2) The Member Secretary shall prepare a chronology of the said meetings and shall, in accordance with the directions of the meeting,
be sent to the concerned for action.
(iii) the matters mentioned in the minutes of the meetings of the Committee as may be prescribed by the competent authority concerned.
The action should be taken within the time frame and a compliance report should be submitted to the committee.
